# Hartron Skill Centre, Hisar

> NCVET-approved Govt. of Haryana franchise computer training institute in Hisar, Haryana. Established 1999. Has trained 20,000+ students. Authorised franchisee of HARTRON (Haryana State Electronics Development Corporation Limited).

## Key facts
- Established: 1999
- Years of operation: 27+
- Total students trained: 20,000+
- Total courses offered: 25 (17 NSQF Aligned + 8 short courses)
- Recognition: NCVET-approved, NSQF-aligned, Government of Haryana
- Head: Bhupender Singla
- Address: Between Nagori Gate & Bus Stand, Near Gurudwara, Hisar, Haryana 125001
- Phone: +91-92158-38058, +91-98120-86917
- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM
- Areas served: Hisar, Hisar Cantt, Balsamand, Mirzapur, Khedar, Agroha, Mangali, Nalwa, Sisai, Adampur, Hansi, Uklana, Barwala, Bhuna, Narnaund and surrounding villages within 40 km of Hisar

## Verified Profiles
- Google Business: https://share.google/2ALIZINPc3PBDrQ7k
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/hartronWorkstationHisar
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/hartronhisar/
- Justdial: https://jsdl.in/DT-992QEU66MMI

## Flagship Courses
- [PWP — Programming with Python](https://hartronhisar.in/courses/pwp): The most in-demand language for AI, data science, and modern development.
- [FC — Fundamentals of Computers](https://hartronhisar.in/courses/fc): Start here if you've never touched a computer
- [CIFT — Course in IT Foundation & Tools](https://hartronhisar.in/courses/cift): Combine IT skills with financial software expertise
- [CCBA — Certificate Course in Computer Basics and Accounting](https://hartronhisar.in/courses/ccba): Computer applications tailored for business operations
- [CCA — Course in Computer Application](https://hartronhisar.in/courses/cca): The foundational govt-recognized course for office and clerk jobs
- [CDA — Course in Digital Accounting](https://hartronhisar.in/courses/cda): Computers + accounting + Tally with GST — built for accounting careers

## Key Pages
- [Home](https://hartronhisar.in/): Overview and featured courses
- [About](https://hartronhisar.in/about): History, head's message, three pillars
- [Courses](https://hartronhisar.in/courses): All 25 courses with filters
- [Gallery](https://hartronhisar.in/gallery): Classrooms and student life
- [Contact](https://hartronhisar.in/contact): Enquiry form, map, hours
